creator: gilinko@yahoo.se
text:
The port of pear-Auth installs files into wrong directory. This is not a duplicate of PR134547, but probably a result from that earlier fix.
 
The following files/directories installs into /usr/local/share/pear:
drwxr-xr-x   2 root  wheel     512 Jun 19 01:01 Container
-r--r--r--   1 root  wheel    6541 Jun 19 01:01 Container.php
drwxr-xr-x   2 root  wheel     512 Jun 19 01:01 Frontend

They should reside in:
/usr/local/share/pear/Auth 

As defined by the pear package list, witch can be viewed by using: 
/usr/local/bin/pear list-files Auth

Fix: 

uninstall from ports
Install pear-Auth using pear binary
How-To-Repeat: Fresh install of security/pear-Auth or upgrade where the earlier package with files are deleted
